title: Heal plugin (cpvp)
description: A plugin that adds a /heal command which is accessible to all players, when you type /heal, it clears all effects and maxes out your saturation,  it also broadcasts a message saying "(Player name) Has healed themselves"
body: Heal plugin for crystal pvp that allows all members to do /heal, when the command is sent the player who typed it will be cleared of all effects and their saturation will be maxed out, once this is done a message will be broadcasted saying: (Player Name) Has healed themselves
